style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">Check Listening Ports</font></span><div><span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">sudo ss -tlnp</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="4380" y="14750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">Check Active Connections</font></span><div><span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">ss -tnp state established</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="4360" y="14890" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" pipeline</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="245" x="4377.5" y="15050" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">High connection churn</font></span><div><span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">HTTP/1.1 traffic spike</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="4025" y="15270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" closed</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="4270" y="15270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<span style="color: rgb(40, 37, 61); text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><font face="Verdana" attack</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="220" x="4520" y="15270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1"
